nasb.text: After you there will arise another kingdom inferior to you, then another third kingdom of bronze, which will rule over all the earth.

esv.text: Another kingdom inferior to you shall arise after you, and yet a third kingdom of bronze, which shall rule over all the earth.

cnv.text: 在你以後，另一國將興起，不及於你。後有第三國，就是那銅的，要統治全地。

ccb.text: 在你之后，必有另一国兴起，不及你的国强大。之后是将要统治天下的第三个国，是铜的。
